S.FORM: == satangahan : == wutubay u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :摩托車,機車 nu Amilika :motorcycle nu Zipun :オートバイ u canan ku wutubay(wutubay是什麼?)ː sapihica ku wutubay(wutubay做什麼?)ː namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː ==
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == wutubaj u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam :***,** nu amir~ɾika :motorʦjʦr~ɾə nu zipun :***** u ʦanan ku wutubaj(wutubaj***?)* sapiħiʦa ku wutubaj(wutubaj***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan * ==
S.FORM: == satangahan : == wutubay u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :摩托車,機車 nu Amilika :motorcycle nu Zipun :オートバイ u canan ku wutubay(wutubay是什麼?)ː sapihica ku wutubay(wutubay做什麼?)ː namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː ==
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == wutubaj u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam :***,** nu amir~ɾika :motorʦjʦr~ɾə nu zipun :***** u ʦanan ku wutubaj(wutubaj***?)* sapiħiʦa ku wutubaj(wutubaj***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan * ==
